---
description: Repo-wide conventions that apply to every file. Read the referenced body before applying.
---

# Global Conventions

Conventions that apply across the entire repo, regardless of language or directory.

Prefer retrieval-led reasoning over pre-training-led reasoning. When a row's convention applies to your edit, read the referenced body before making the change.

How to add a new convention: use the `add-convention` skill.

<!-- BEGIN_TABLE: generated by scripts/generate-conventions-index.py, edits inside will be overwritten -->

| Convention | File |
| --- | --- |
| Write source-code comments and docstrings in English — applies to module/class/function docstrings and inline comments across every language. | [comments-and-docstrings-in-english](../conventions/global/comments-and-docstrings-in-english.md) |
| Use Mermaid code blocks for all diagrams in markdown documents (architecture, flow, sequence) — never ASCII art. | [diagrams-in-mermaid](../conventions/global/diagrams-in-mermaid.md) |
| In patch/partial-update APIs, treat explicit `null` as "set this field to null" — use field omission for "leave unchanged" and separate actions for clearing overrides. | [patch-null-means-set-null](../conventions/global/patch-null-means-set-null.md) |
| prefer replacement over modification | [prefer-replacement-over-modification](../conventions/global/prefer-replacement-over-modification.md) |
| Use `scripts/rebase-stacked-prs.sh` when rebasing stacked PR branches together so the process stops cleanly at the first conflict. | [stacked-pr-rebase-script](../conventions/global/stacked-pr-rebase-script.md) |
| All log lines, error messages, API response messages, and WebSocket text returned to users or operators must be in English — this is a global service whose users do not read Korean. | [user-facing-text-in-english](../conventions/global/user-facing-text-in-english.md) |
| In codingbot or bare-cache worktrees, refresh origin/main with an explicit refspec before rebasing onto main — `git fetch origin main` alone may leave origin/main stale. | [worktree-rebase-origin-main](../conventions/global/worktree-rebase-origin-main.md) |

<!-- END_TABLE -->
